results.title: Arbonne International - Wikipedia
results.content: # Arbonne International. **Arbonne International**, **LLC**, known as Arbonne, is an American multi-level marketing company founded in 1980 in the United States by Norwegian entrepreneur Petter Mørck. Arbonne is headquartered in Irvine, California, US, with US offices in Chatsworth, California, Greenwood, Indiana, Addison, Texas, and international offices in Australia, Canada, New Zealand, Poland, and the United Kingdom. Founded in Orem, Utah, United States by Mørck in 1980, Arbonne is named after the Swiss village of Arbon. In February 2018, Groupe Rocher, Paris "Yves Rocher (company)"), agreed to acquire Arbonne International and Nature's Gate from Natural Products Group. Between 2007 and 2009, the number of the company's consultants fell from 1.3 million to under 800,000. In 2006, Arbonne opened for business in Canada, then Australia in 2007, and the United Kingdom in 2008. In 2014, the company launched Arbonne Poland, and then New Zealand in 2016. In March 2018, Arbonne was acquired by Groupe Rocher "Yves Rocher (company)"). American multi-level marketing company.

results.title: H - Wikipedia
results.content: # H. Eighth letter of the Latin alphabet. Not to be confused with the Greek letter Η, the Cyrillic letters Н or Һ, or the planetary symbol ♄. **H** (minuscule: **h**) is the eighth letter "Letter (alphabet)") of the Latin alphabet, used in the modern English alphabet, including the alphabets of other Western European languages and others worldwide. The pronunciation /heɪtʃ/ may be a hypercorrection formed by analogy with the names of the other letters of the alphabet, most of which include the sound they represent. The *Oxford English Dictionary* says the original name of the letter was  in Latin; this became  in Vulgar Latin, passed into English via Old French , and by Middle English was pronounced . Anatoly Liberman suggests a conflation of two obsolete orderings of the alphabet, one with *H* immediately followed by *K* and the other without any *K*: reciting the former's *..., H, K, L,...* as [...(h)a ka el ...] when reinterpreted for the latter *..., H, L,...* would imply a pronunciation of [(h)a ka] for *H*.

results.title: H Definition & Meaning | Dictionary.com
results.content: the eighth letter of the English alphabet, a consonant. # h. #### Noun Inflected Forms. 2. any spoken sound represented by the letter *H* or *h,* as in *hot* or *behave.*. 3. something having the shape of an H . 4. a written or printed representation of the letter *H* or *h.*. 5. a device, as a printer's type, for reproducing the letter *H* or *h.*. 1. the eighth in order or in a series. 2. horizontal component of the earth's magnetic field. 6. *Music.* the letter used in German to indicate the tone B. 1. (in prescriptions) an hour. 1. the eighth letter and sixth consonant of the modern English alphabet. 2. a speech sound represented by this letter, in English usually a voiceless glottal fricative, as in *hat*. something shaped like an H. ### Origin of H. > At the beginning of a word, the letter **h** is never followed by a consonant. > From Seattle Times • Feb. 2, 2023.

results.content: ## Real estate success isn't *just* about getting licensed, it's the work you put in afterward that matters. AgentEDU® is built for real-world success, helping agents generate leads, close deals, and scale their business with confidence. Whether you're a new agent trying to gain traction, an experienced agent ready to level up, a team leader building systems or a broker looking to train agents at scale, AgentEDU® gives you a clear path forward. Learn the foundational skills of real estate in this course designed for newly-licensed agents. Learn the how to expertly represent home buyers in this course designed for newly-licensed agents. Learn the how to expertly represent sellers in this course designed for newly-licensed agents. In this course, learn how to use real estate advertising, generate leads and get them converting. In this course series, learn how to negotiate like a pro for buyers and sellers alike. In this course, learn everything on how to make open houses work for you and your real estate business.

We oversee design, permitting, financing, and construction — ensuring projects are delivered efficiently and positioned for success. Our market knowledge, marketing strategies, and negotiation skills help space get leased quickly and at competitive terms. ### Advisory & Asset Strategy. Real estate is more than bricks and mortar — it’s a business strategy. We provide portfolio planning, capital markets advisory, and long-term asset positioning to help you align your real estate with financial goals. Our management platform safeguards your asset’s value and tenant relationships. We handle the day-to-day so you can focus on scaling your portfolio. We’re here to help! Fill out the form below or reach out directly using the provided details, and we’ll get back to you promptly.
